title: Abbott Sells $20 Billion of Bonds for Exact Sciences Buy
description: Abbott Laboratories sold $20 billion of bonds to help fund its acquisition of cancer-screening company Exact Sciences Corp. on Monday, one of the US high-grade market’s biggest offerings this year.
content: Abbott Laboratories sold $20 billion of bonds to help fund its acquisition of cancer-screening company Exact Sciences Corp. on Monday, one of the US high-grade market’s biggest offerings this year.
